response.justification: While Bogdan possesses an impressive technical background with strong open-source contributions and polyglot engineering skills, he falls short of the executive-level leadership and formal team management requirements. Most critically, his basic German proficiency does not meet the strict C1 requirement necessary for client advising and operational leadership in this consulting role.
strengths: Extensive polyglot engineering experience across modern software systems and open-source platforms.
Strong background in Linux environments and architectural design, including microservices and event-driven platforms.
Demonstrated commitment to mentoring and knowledge sharing through technical workshops and code dojos.
concerns: Basic German language skills fall significantly below the required minimum C1 proficiency for client communication.
Lacks explicit executive-level leadership and formal team management experience required for a Head of Development role.
Missing required expertise in UML modeling, enterprise risk management, and formal IT compliance.
